title: Blackspur BB-FD100 Foam Draught Excluder Set
features: Fits one standard door or average window
Protect your home from unwanted heat loss
Measures 5.5m length by 9mm width by 5mm thickness
description: Product Description Blackspur Foam draught excluder set is waterproof, self adhesive foam excluder will help to protect your home from unwanted heat loss. Ideal for all windows and doors to seal draughty gaps, it will fit one standard door or average window. Simply peel, apply and cut to size. Measures 5.5m length by 9mm width by 5mm thickness. Supplied in branded polybag. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 2x Foam Draught Excluder
